description: Scenario metadata keyed by scene id (matches viewer/scenes/*.json id). Merged into /api/scenarios and coach prompts. PNG stills in content/stills/ are optional exports only.

format.title: Short display title
format.image_path: Optional — legacy PNG export path under content/stills/ (not used by the app UI)
tags: Array of situation tags matching playbook families
format.situation_hint: Optional team note — not visible in image; agent should treat as supplemental
format.interaction_default: teach_first | coach_only — teach_first shows image + template before coach breakdown
format.coach_reveal_available: Boolean — user can request full analysis after teach-back review

scenarios.title: Slot Seam — Pass Across Royal Road
scenarios.situation_hint: 5v5, puck moving low-to-high then across the slot. Focus on lateral timing.

scenarios.title: Point Shot Through Layered Screen
scenarios.situation_hint: 5v5, defender boxed out net-front. Shooter at top of circle.

scenarios.title: 2-on-1 — Carrier vs. Cross-Crease
scenarios.situation_hint: Rush entering zone, backchecker reaching. No extra context on handedness.

scenarios.title: Wrap Attempt Below Goal Line
scenarios.situation_hint: Cycle play, puck below goal line on strong side.
